testcase.name: test_minimal_payload_creates_case
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_existing_implants_iter211.py:57: in test_minimal_payload_creates_case assert r.status_code == 200, f"{r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: 500: {"error":"Internal server error","detail":"'case_id'"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_system_unknown_implant
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_existing_implants_iter211.py:87: in test_system_unknown_implant assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"error":"The 2:00 PM slot on 2026-06-19 is already booked for patient TEST_iter211A1 (scheduled by Dr. Abhijit Patil). Please choose a different time or date.","detail":"The 2:00 PM slot on 2026-06-19 is already booked for patient TEST_iter211A1 (scheduled by Dr. Abhijit Patil). Please choose a different time or date."} E assert 409 == 200 E + where 409 = <Response [409]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_prosthesis_history_failed_round_trip
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_existing_implants_iter211.py:112: in test_prosthesis_history_failed_round_trip assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"error":"The 2:00 PM slot on 2026-06-19 is already booked for patient TEST_iter211A1 (scheduled by Dr. Abhijit Patil). Please choose a different time or date.","detail":"The 2:00 PM slot on 2026-06-19 is already booked for patient TEST_iter211A1 (scheduled by Dr. Abhijit Patil). Please choose a different time or date."} E assert 409 == 200 E + where 409 = <Response [409]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_duplicate_slot_returns_409
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_existing_implants_iter211.py:150: in test_duplicate_slot_returns_409 assert r1.status_code == 200, r1.text E AssertionError: {"error":"Internal server error","detail":"'case_id'"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_appears_in_procedures_list
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_existing_implants_iter211.py:159: in test_appears_in_procedures_list assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"error":"The 2:00 PM slot on 2026-06-19 is already booked for patient TEST_iter211A1 (scheduled by Dr. Abhijit Patil). Please choose a different time or date.","detail":"The 2:00 PM slot on 2026-06-19 is already booked for patient TEST_iter211A1 (scheduled by Dr. Abhijit Patil). Please choose a different time or date."} E assert 409 == 200 E + where 409 = <Response [409]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_fresh_case_endpoint_still_accepts_minimal_payload
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_existing_implants_iter211.py:192: in test_fresh_case_endpoint_still_accepts_minimal_payload assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"{r.status_code}: {r.text[:400]}" E AssertionError: 400: {"error":"Invalid loading type: Delayed","detail":"Invalid loading type: Delayed"} E assert 400 in (200, 201) E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
